title: Rough Crumbly Moroccan Oats Tangia
description: A bitter and crumbly Moroccan dish featuring oats, marinated in a blend of spices and herbs, cooked in a traditional tangia, ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Add the rolled oats to the bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the marinade.
Let the oats marinate for at least 30 minutes.
In a large tangia or clay pot, combine the marinated oats, chopped parsley, chopped cilantro, and minced garlic.
Cover the tangia with a lid and bake for 45 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, or until the oats are lightly toasted and crumbly.
Remove the tangia from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Rough Crumbly Moroccan Oats Tangia hot, garnished with additional parsley and cilantro if desired.
